---
title: "Working Papers"
---

Matthew DiGiuseppe and Patrick E. Shea. "Predicting Debt Crisis"\
[Paper](../../files/papers/Predict_Crises_June2026.pdf) | [Slides](../../files/slides/Predict_Crises_June2026.pdf)

Matthew DiGiuseppe and Patrick E. Shea. "Politics of Odious Debt"\
[Paper](../../files/papers/Odious_Debt_June2026.pdf) | [Slides](../../files/slides/Odious_Debt_June2026.pdf)

Ben Cormier, Natalya Naqvi, and Patrick E. Shea. "Credit Ratings in the Age of Index Investment"\
[Paper](../../files/papers/CRAsIndexes_June2026.pdf) | [Slides](../../files/slides/EPSS_June2026.pdf)

Justin Kirkland and Patrick E. Shea. "Politics of Financial Disclosure and Firms"

Maha Rafi Atal and Patrick E. Shea. "Green Land Deals"

Patrick E. Shea. "China's Debt Diplomacy"

Patrick E. Shea. "Critical Minerals and Conflict"\
[Slides](../../files/slides/Critical_Minerals.pdf)

Jonas Bunte, Burak Giray, and Patrick E. Shea. "Political Economy of International Land Acquisitions"
